title: salix × beckii
intro: Salix × beckii, also known as the hybrid willow, is a cross between the white willow (Salix alba) and the Goosely willow (Salix purpurea), resulting in a unique and adaptable plant species. The medicinal properties of Salix × beckii lie in its bark, which contains salicin, a compound that has anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties. The health benefits of Salix × beckii include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to help with fever reduction and digestive issues. Salix × beckii is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to take advantage of its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
